testcase.name: test_payment_email_400

failure.message: AssertionError: expected graceful 400, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 400 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter63_payment_lifecycle.py:265: in test_payment_email_400 assert r.status_code == 400, f"expected graceful 400, got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: expected graceful 400, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 400 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
